description: Use this API to purge specified data point in harmonics current source table. This API routine was first introduced in release 35.4.0. ierr = har_cursrc_purg_onept(name, hpt)

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Harmonics current source table name. (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: hpt
parameters.description: Harmonic number (h) at a point in data table where h, r/r0, l/) and c/c0 data is purged. (input; no default allowed).

error_codes.description: prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
